title: Piper pseudojalapense
taxonomy: Piper pseudojalapense is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. It belongs to the genus Piper, which comprises various species of pepper plants. Piper pseudojalapense is native to the Americas and is closely related to other species within the same genus. The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, with the subkingdom Angiosperm and class Magnoliopsida. The species is also classified under the order Piperales and the family Piperaceae.
